patch.value:
## Context

`src/core/checkpoint/mutation-checkpoint.ts` writes checkpoint JSON files under `checkpoints/<subdir>/`. The `pm gc` command at `src/cli/commands/gc.ts:13` defines `GC_SCOPE_VALUES = ['index', 'embeddings', 'runtime', 'locks']` — checkpoints is absent.

Checkpoint files include `created_at`, `author`, and `items` but have no TTL field. A project running bulk mutations regularly accumulates these files with no way to reclaim them other than manual deletion.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Add `checkpoints` to `GC_SCOPE_VALUES` in gc.ts
- [ ] GC sweeps `checkpoints/` by `created_at` age (default: prune files older than N days, configurable)
- [ ] `--dry-run` shows what would be removed
- [ ] Contract/flag tests updated; `pm gc --scope checkpoints` documented
- [ ] At minimum, document the checkpoints directory and advise manual cleanup in the guide

## Evidence

- `src/cli/commands/gc.ts:13` — `GC_SCOPE_VALUES` does not include checkpoints
- `src/core/checkpoint/mutation-checkpoint.ts:78-88` — writes to `checkpoints/<subdir>/`
- `.agents/pm/checkpoints/update-many/` exists in this repo with accumulated files
gc --scope checkpoints: prune stale bulk-mutation checkpoint files

pm gc currently covers scopes: index, embeddings, runtime, locks. The checkpoints/ directory (written by update-many and close-many rollback logic) is never collected. Old checkpoint files accumulate indefinitely under .agents/pm/checkpoints/. There is no TTL or gc coverage for this scope.

- Add `checkpoints` to `GC_SCOPE_VALUES` in gc.ts
- GC sweeps `checkpoints/` by `created_at` age (default: prune files older than N days, configurable)
- `--dry-run` shows what would be removed
- Contract/flag tests updated; `pm gc --scope checkpoints` documented
- At minimum, document the checkpoints directory and advise manual cleanup in the guide
